description_text: COPER2018'S STORE Item description Features: 2Pcs Winglet Type Style Black Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser Splitters Canard-2610 Custom fit most vehicles, product may require drilling holes and apply bolts to attach to your bumper Use double side adhesive tape or drill holes and bolt on to your bumper (bolts are included,like pics.) Give your car a more aggressive racing look Professional installation is highly recommended Specifications: Material: Polyurethane (ABS) Color:Black Placement on Vehicle:Left, Right, Rear Fitment: Custom Universal fit most vehicles Package Included: 2Pcs bumper splitters Please measure your rear bumper and make sure these splitters will fit your bumper before purchase Notice: - Please allow 1-3CM differs due to manual measurement. - Due to the different display and different light, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thanks for your understanding Product overview Shipping Policy Payment Description Returns Policy About Us 1.Item location:Guangzhou,China Item will be shipped out receipt of your payment. We ship the item through CHINA Air mail. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct. If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment. Combing shipment is not allowed. If you wants to combine all the items together, you should still pay for all of the shipping, insurance and handing fees. Considering the cost of business and easy shipping, usually the item is packed in retail packaging. Normally, the item will arrive in 15-20 days. But sometimes it takes a little bit longer, goes to 20-30 days or more 2.Item location:California, United States Item will be shipped out within 24 hours upon receipt of your payment. Orders from the USA will all be shipped out via Carrier UPS OR USPS.Usually it takes up 3~8 business days for delivery. Delivery time (including weekend): 5.21%(1~2days)----65.68%(3~5D)----22.19%(6~8D)----2.47%(9~10D)----1.26%(above 10D) When you find track information is abnormal or not get goods in 10 days, please feel free to email contact us first for troubleshooting,Don't open dispute case immediately Please.
